reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark evidenceStatus=satisfied when checked-in tests and docs directly support the install-channel boundary without claiming live migration.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim is install-channel policy backed by release smoke tests and user-facing migration guidance.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by the checked-in install-channel evidence bundle: release smoke accepts only install_sh, a focused test rejects homebrew, and docs direct legacy Homebrew users to uninstall and reinstall through install.sh.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep this claim covered when adding install channels, update behavior, release smoke channels, or migration guidance.
